hero.headline: Precision Care for Your Perfect Pool
hero.subheadline: Tampa pool owners trust Precision Pools for weekly service that never misses a detail. CPO-certified technicians handle every chemical check, every brush stroke, every filter — so you just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care Built<br class="hidden md:block"> Around Your Schedule
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency storm cleanup, Precision Pools delivers detail-driven service that keeps your water crystal clear and your equipment running right.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning including skimming, chemical balancing, and equipment monitoring. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Full-Service Pool Care
cards.description: Complete care covering chemical balancing, brushing, vacuuming, and thorough equipment checks to ensure optimal water clarity and sanitation.

cards.title: Post-Storm Cleanup
cards.description: Rapid response after Tampa storms to remove debris, rebalance chemicals, and restore your pool to safe swimming condition — often within 24 hours.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough cleaning and inspection of your filtration system to ensure maximum efficiency, proper flow rates, and consistently clean water.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. Most repairs completed same-visit to minimize your downtime.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for hotels, resorts, HOAs, and community pools. Consistent scheduling and detailed reporting for property managers.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Precision-Clean Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just straightforward pricing.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule and cover everything — skimming, chemicals, brushing, vacuuming, and a full equipment check every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything ever falls short, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Tampa Trusts Precision Pools
about.headline: Built on Detail, Driven by Results
about.description: Founded in 2022 by Lynn University graduate Griffin Shahmanesh, Precision Pools was built on a simple belief: Tampa pool owners deserve better. Every technician is CPO-certified and background-checked. Every visit follows a meticulous checklist. And every pool we touch gets the same precision care — whether it's a backyard oasis or a commercial property.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every team member holds a Certified Pool Operator credential, ensuring expert-level chemical management and equipment knowledge.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees — just consistent results that keep you coming back.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not satisfied with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. That's the Precision Pools promise to every client.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Precision Perfect" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No questions, no runaround. We don't consider the job done until your pool meets our standard and yours.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Tampa are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For post-storm emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Call us and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Precision Pools technician is CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator) and fully background-checked. Your safety and peace of mind are non-negotiable.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties. We believe in earning your trust every single visit — not locking you into agreements.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for hotels, resorts, HOAs, and community centers across Tampa. Commercial clients get dedicated scheduling and detailed monthly reporting.

testimonials.name: Gilberto G.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Griffin and his team for any of your pool service needs. Extremely professional and top notch customer service.

testimonials.name: WJS
testimonials.text: Griffin is reliable, polite and efficient. He is very accommodating and pays attention to detail.

testimonials.name: Thomas W.
testimonials.text: Always excited to work with Griffin. His attention to detail and professionalism make every service visit worth the call.
